MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT NOE'S NEST, INC. DBA NOE'S NEST BED AND BREAKFAST'S MOTION FOR MONETARY AND TERMINATING SANCTIONS FOR ABUSE OF DISCOVERY PROCESS IS DENIED IN PART AND PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN ONE LAST CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 2025.010 ET SEQ. NO LATER THAN 2/4/15 AT 5:00 P.M., PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO: (1) APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION AND (2) PAY DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL $1,226.60 IN CCP 2023.030(A) MONETARY SANCTIONS, CONSISTING OF $221.60 PRIOR SANCTIONS PLUS $1,005 REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS FOR THIS MOTION (4 HRS. AT $150 PER HR. AND $120 FILING FEES, AND $285.00 FOR THE SECOND TRANSCRIPT FOR NON APPEARANCE). PLAINTIFF IS ADMONISHED THAT, IN THE EVENT HE FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION, THE COURT WILL BE INCLINED TO GRANT A FUTURE CCP 2023.030(D)(3) MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: FRANK CONWAY; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2015 Continued To Feb-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions For Abuse Of Discovery Process
Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Lizabeth N. de Vries, Esq. of Scott Law Firm, Tel. 415.561.9603, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling, with modification. DEFENDANT NOE'S NEST, INC. DBA NOE'S NEST BED AND BREAKFAST's Motion For Monetary And Terminating Sanctions For Abuse Of Discovery Process is DENIED IN PART and Plaintiff is given one last chance to comply with CCP 2025.010 et seq. No later than 2/4/15 at 5:00 P.M., Plaintiff is ordered to: (1) appear for his deposition and (2) pay Defendant's counsel $1,226.60 in CCP 2023.030(a) monetary sanctions, consisting of $221.60 prior sanctions plus $1,005 reasonable attorney's fees and costs for this motion (4 hrs. at $150 per hr. and $120 filing fees, and $285.00 for the second transcript for non appearance). Plaintiff is admonished that, in the event he fails to comply with this order without substantial justification, the Court will be inclined to grant a future CCP 2023.030(d)(3) motion for terminating sanctions. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Frank Conway; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition And Related Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Tuesday, December 16, 2014:
Lizabeth N. de Vries of the Scott Law Firm (415.561.9600), attorney for Defendant NOE'S NEST, INC. DBA NOE'S NEST BED AND BREAKFAST;
No other appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NOE'S NEST, INC. DBA NOE'S NEST BED AND BREAKFAST'S Unopposed Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition is GRANTED. Defendant's motion for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $221.60. Sanctions to be paid within ten (10) days. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Noah D. Lebowitz; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
